narrative:
Precinct Galena (precinct in Delaware County) has 1,169 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
